use_cases: AI chatbot interfaces requiring dynamic text input
Search inputs with AI-powered real-time web search
Universal input components that auto-resize with content
Modern messaging interfaces with animated placeholders
ai_summary: A modern AI input component with auto-resizing textarea functionality that smoothly animates between different placeholder states. Features a custom hook for height adjustment and AnimatePresence for fluid placeholder transitions between 'Ask AI anything' and 'Search the web' modes. Includes icon buttons for attachments and actions, designed with dark mode support using Tailwind CSS.
